roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox, safe update controller and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer order/service UI, reseller web dashboard and PasarGuard service lifecycle
roles.processor: advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

features: adds a two-step permanent service deletion button inside the customer service detail screen
deletes the remote PasarGuard user while preserving local order and payment history
stops auto renewal, health monitoring, guarantee and failover jobs after service deletion
verifies Processor through direct health, runtime version and business execution paths
never reports repair completed when Processor or another required group failed
edits the original error-center message during repair to prevent duplicate Telegram result messages
keeps all previous service-list simplification, normalized D1 schema and recovery protections

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; no manual D1 action is required
deployment.pasarguard_delete_permission: the connected panel administrator must have users.delete permission

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
the list intentionally shows active delivered services only; cancelled orders are not repeated in the service selector
remote service deletion still requires users.delete permission on the connected PasarGuard administrator
